'''Erkwil''' was a [[Pacithhip/Legends|Pacithhip]] male who lived on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. He was a [[Spice/Legends|spice]] dealer and an ex-convict.

==Biography==
One evening, Erkwil was taking shelter in [[Tosche Station/Legends|Tosche Station]] from a sand storm when [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] entered. Fearful of being arrested for spice possession, Erkwil tried to sell his drugs to some out-of-towners, and when that failed, tried to hide the spice in their belongings. The stormtroopers were encouraged by an elderly local, [[Ezrim]], and eventually tried to arrest the visitors. Erkwil successfully avoided drawing any attention to himself.
